name: Creamy Balsamic Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a 2-cup bowl.
2. Whisk until smooth.
3. Chill several hours before serving over salad greens.
4. Makes enough for 8-10 people.
SERVING SUGGESTION: For a truly Italian entree, serve shredded chicken over iceberg lettuce topped with this dressing.
